description: Fixed camera poses for visual regression. biomeAnchor values reference src/world/generation-utils.ts and src/systems/ground-system.ts constants.

viewpoints.name: spawn
viewpoints.description: Player start position - central view of the world

viewpoints.name: lake
viewpoints.description: Water/refractive surfaces - tests water shader quality
viewpoints.biomeAnchor: LAKE_BOUNDS center (~20, 20); Melody Lake mesh at (20, 1.5, 20)

viewpoints.name: forest
viewpoints.description: Dense foliage - tests tree rendering and LOD

viewpoints.name: night
viewpoints.description: Night scene - tests lighting and glow effects

viewpoints.name: slope_foot
viewpoints.description: First-person hillside foot — ground contact on sloped forest trees
viewpoints.biomeAnchor: forest procedural quadrant + ARPEGGIO_GROVE slope (generation-utils ARPEGGIO_GROVE centerX:-60 centerZ:60)

viewpoints.name: lake_edge
viewpoints.description: Lake basin rim — terrain meets carved Melody Lake (seam + reflection)

viewpoints.name: forest_horizon
viewpoints.description: Forest treeline at ~250u — LOD impostor cross-fade regression

viewpoints.name: horizon_lod
viewpoints.description: Elevated vantage at 280u — distant LOD tier transitions and fog horizon
viewpoints.biomeAnchor: 300u world edge treeline; CONFIG.fog far ~100u visible band

viewpoints.name: gem_corridor_scale
viewpoints.description: Gem canopy corridor — instanced gem-fruit scale and depth relationships
